$schema_note: Cross-provider price index for Routstr (kind 38421) inference providers, built by probing each alive clearnet endpoint's unauthenticated /v1/models at snapshot time. models[] is sorted by how many providers serve the model; each model's providers[] is sorted cheapest-first by sats_per_prompt_token. Units: sats per token (prompt/completion); sats_max_cost_per_request is the provider's stated per-request ceiling. Prices are the providers' own published numbers, not endorsements — verify before trusting. Provider inventory + liveness: /live/snapshot.json. Part of https://marketplace.bitcoineconomy.ai.
